c_axon_virtual_visit_15min_reminder.instructionThree: If you need to reschedule or you miss your visit time, please contact us.
c_axon_virtual_visit_15min_reminder.instructionsOne: Before the visit begins, please make sure you are in a quiet and private place.
c_axon_virtual_visit_15min_reminder.instructionsTwo: If using a mobile app, you will receive a notification on your mobile device 5 minutes before the start of your virtual visit. When it’s time for your televisit, please log in to your study app and press  ‘Join Waiting Room.’
c_axon_virtual_visit_15min_reminder.subject: Your virtual visit starts in 15 minutes!
c_axon_virtual_visit_15min_reminder.visitStarts: Your virtual visit starts in 15 minutes.

c_axon_virtual_visit_5min_reminder.instructionThree: If you need to reschedule or you miss your visit time, please contact us.

c_axon_virtual_visit_new.instructionOne: Before the visit begins, please make sure you are in a quiet and private place.
c_axon_virtual_visit_new.instructionThree: Best of luck with your virtual visit! If you need to reschedule, please contact us.
c_axon_virtual_visit_new.instructionTwo: If using a mobile app, you will receive a notification on your mobile device 5 minutes before the start of your virtual visit. When it’s time for your televisit, please log in to your study app and press ‘Join Waiting Room.’
c_axon_virtual_visit_new.subject: We’ve scheduled your virtual visit!
c_axon_virtual_visit_new.title: We scheduled your virtual visit for {{date}} at {{time}} {{timezone}}.

c_axon_virtual_visit_reminder.instructionTwo: If using a mobile app,you will receive a notification on your mobile device 15 minutes before the start of your virtual visit. When it’s time for your televisit, please log in to your study app and click ‘Join Waiting Room.’
